scope_controls: Production integration managed through a separate validation path
default_review_basis: The summary organizes measured vitals and selected answers for human review.

review_basis_by_effect.measured_elevated_heart_rate_demo: Measured heart-rate cue is visible in this session and should be reviewed with the selected answers.
review_basis_by_effect.associated_warning_symptom_selected: Selected associated cardiopulmonary symptoms support staff confirmation in this demo workflow.
review_basis_by_effect.associated_symptoms_none_selected: No listed associated symptoms were selected; staff can review this alongside the measured heart-rate cue.

review_action_by_effect.associated_warning_symptom_selected: Please confirm the selected associated symptoms and review them with the measured vital payload.
review_action_by_effect.patient_requests_staff_help: Please check the patient promptly in the demo workflow because the patient selected that staff help is needed now.
review_action_by_effect.history_meds_needs_staff_confirmation: Please confirm rhythm-history and medication context with the patient.
review_action_by_effect.medication_allergy_needs_staff_confirmat: Please confirm medication allergy and medicine context with the patient.

default_review_action: Please review measured heart rate, reported symptoms, rhythm-history selection, and medication/allergy confirmation.

staff_handoff_note_by_path.warning: Review measured heart rate and selected associated cardiopulmonary symptoms.
staff_handoff_note_by_path.low_concern: Review measured heart rate and reported palpitation / chest-tightness context.
